caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted dreadlocks tied up is seated in a studio setting, wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt with a white graphic. She sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a black screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text, and a sign above it reads "Employee Only". On-screen graphics include a logo with a microphone icon and the text "PODCAST" along with the phrase "BOSS TALK 101" and smaller text saying "By 11 logo Studio". Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, looking slightly to her left. Her expression shifts from a neutral gaze to a subtle smile, with her eyes narrowing and the corners of her mouth curving upward as she reacts to something off-screen.
